# aifolimizer — Track Record & Methodology

*Last generated: 2026-05-29 21:01 UTC*  
*Auto-generated by `trust_report.generate_report()`. Refresh: `mcp__aifolimizer__generate_trust_report`.*

---

> **Methodology disclosure.** Backtest results below are walk-forward out-of-sample where labelled (column / footer indicates IS vs OOS). 7d / 30d / 90d windows are FORWARD-test cohorts marked-to-market daily; identical numbers across windows are expected when no signal in the cohort has aged past the smaller window — they are not duplicate runs. Wealthsimple Managed comparison numbers (if present) are sourced from Wealthsimple's published Performance Disclosure (https://www.wealthsimple.com/en-ca/legal/managed-investing-performance) retrieved at generation time. Transaction costs deducted at 5 bps/leg unless noted. Survivorship: backtests use current index membership; delisted names are not back-filled.

---

## Disclaimer

> This is a personal DIY investment tool, not financial advice. Past results are
> not predictive of future performance. The author is not a registered advisor.
> All figures are self-reported and unaudited by a third party.

---

## Evidence Tier

> **SEED-ESTABLISHED** — 103 closed forward signals (≥100). Minimum sample met — judge by calibration and net-of-cost expectancy, not raw win rate.
>
> Evidence hierarchy used here: `proven edge` (large forward sample + calibrated +
> positive net expectancy) > `reasonable thesis` > `experimental`. Until the forward
> sample is large enough, treat every recommendation as **experimental**.
>
> **Survivorship-bias caveat:** the broad backtest universe is a fixed list of names
> that still trade today. Free data lacks delisted/merged tickers, so backtest returns
> are biased upward versus a true point-in-time universe. Treat them as a lower-bound
> sanity check on mechanics, not a return forecast.

---

## Methodology

### Data Sources
| Source | Type | Tier |
|---|---|---|
| yfinance | prices, fundamentals, news | free, no key |
| FRED | macro (Fed funds, CPI, CAD/USD) | free, no key |
| CoinGecko v3 | crypto prices | free, no key |
| CNN Fear & Greed | sentiment | free, no key |
| Google News RSS | news headlines | free, no key |
| Finnhub | quotes + fundamentals fallback | free, key required |
| Alpha Vantage | fundamentals fallback | free, key required |
| Tiingo | EOD history fallback | free, key required |

### Skills Backtested

Each skill is approximated by a deterministic Python rule applied to OHLC bars.
LLM thesis, news sentiment, and qualitative overlay are NOT replayed.
Treat rule-based results as a **lower bound** on actual skill quality.
Signals are shifted one bar before execution (no same-bar look-ahead).

---

## Historical Backtest Results

### Mechanics — Unbiased Broad Basket

40+ symbols across 11 GICS sectors including laggards and drawdown names — tests strategy mechanics, not single-name luck.

- Universe: XLK, XLF, XLV, XLY, XLP, XLE, XLI, XLU, XLRE, XLB, XLC, SPY, … (51 total)
- Lookback: 1095 days
- Transaction cost: 5.0 bps/leg

| Skill | Rule Proxy | CAGR % | Sharpe | Sortino | Max DD % | Hit Rate % | Alpha vs SPY % |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| portfolio_health | buy_hold (proxy) | 21.24 | 1.48 | 1.93 | -16.92 | 95.92 | +15.9 |
| risk_assessment | sma200_trend_filter | 8.55 | 1.05 | 1.15 | -10.75 | 42.66 | -34.4 |
| stock_analysis | sma50_trend | 8.76 | 1.18 | 1.56 | -6.72 | 40.39 | -33.7 |
| stock_compare | relative_strength_proxy | 8.76 | 1.18 | 1.56 | -6.72 | 40.39 | -33.7 |
| macro_impact | sma200_regime | 8.55 | 1.05 | 1.15 | -10.75 | 42.66 | -34.4 |
| dividend_strategy | sma200_quality | 8.55 | 1.05 | 1.15 | -10.75 | 42.66 | -34.4 |
| earnings_analyzer | vol_cluster_avoid | 19.36 | 1.39 | 1.81 | -16.89 | 81.03 | +7.8 |
| earnings_postmortem | rsi_swing_post_event | 9.37 | 1.22 | 1.55 | -9.08 | 87.01 | -31.5 |
| sector_rotation | 12m_momentum_faber | 11.65 | 1.24 | 1.3 | -12.57 | 50.18 | -23.1 |
| tax_loss_review | bollinger_lband_revert | 8.79 | 1.26 | 1.82 | -3.71 | 77.17 | -33.5 |
| adversarial_research | consensus_fade_top5pct | 18.87 | 1.38 | 1.8 | -16.5 | 66.57 | +5.7 |
| cash_deployment | golden_cross_add | 8.89 | 0.95 | 1.02 | -13.2 | 56.25 | -33.2 |
| daily_briefing | macd_trend | 4.35 | 0.64 | 0.71 | -11.01 | 43.57 | -48.7 |

*SPY and XEQT.TO returns over same period used as benchmark.*
